checkAccountEmailPage.defaultErrorMessage: An error has occurred. Please try again later.
checkAccountEmailPage.invalidEmailError: Please enter a valid email address.
checkAccountEmailPage.emailNotFoundAlertError: Email not found.  You may need to [create a Business.NJ.gov account and link with myNewJersey](/onboarding?page=1).
checkAccountEmailPage.assistanceText: For more assistance, visit our [Login Issues Help page](/support/login) or

checkAccountEmailPage.subButtonText: Or, if you've never logged in to Business.NJ.gov
